fi\n}\n\n# Validate output redirection paths\nvalidate_log_paths() {\n    log_section \"Validating Log File Paths\"\n\n    local log_dir_exists=0\n    local log_dir_writable=0\n\n    if [[ -d fi\n\n    if [[ -w \"$LOG_DIR\" ]]; then\n        log_info \"✓ Log directory is writable\"\n        log_dir_writable=1\n    else\n        log_error \"✗ Log directory is not writable\"\n        return 1\n    fi\n\n    if [[ $log_dir_exists -eq 1 && $log_dir_writable -eq 1 ]]; then\n        log_info \"✓ All log path validations passed\"\n        return 0\n    else\n        log_error \"✗ Log path validation failed\"\n        return 1\n    fi\n}\n\n# Setup output redirection configuration\nsetup_redirection() {\n    log_section \"Setting Up Output Redirection\"\n\n    echo \"LOG_DIR=$LOG_DIR\"\n    echo \"STDOUT_LOG=$STDOUT_LOG\"\n    echo \"STDERR_LOG=$STDERR_LOG\"\n    echo \"COMBINED_LOG=$COMBINED_LOG\"\n    echo \"SUMMARY_LOG=$SUMMARY_LOG\"\n    echo \"RUST_LOG_PRESET=$RUST_LOG_PRESET\"\n    echo \"RUST_LOG=${RUST_LOG_PRESETS[$RUST_LOG_PRESET]}\"\n}\n\n# Test output redirection with sample command\ntest_redirection() {\n    log_section \"Testing Output Redirection\"\n\n    log_info \"Running test command with output redirection...\"\n\n    # Sample test command that produces both stdout and stderr\n    local test_stdout_msg=\"This is a test stdout message at $(date)\"\n    local test_stderr_msg=\"This is a test stderr message at $(date)\"\n\n    # Create test output using traditional redirection with tee\n    (\n        echo \"$test_stdout_msg\"\n        echo \"Multiple lines\"\n        echo \"of test output\"\n        echo \"$test_stderr_msg\" >&2\n        echo \"for validation\" >&2\n    ) 2>&1 | tee \"$COMBINED_LOG\" > /dev/null\n\n    # Separate stdout and stderr capture\n    (\n        echo \"$test_stdout_msg\"\n        echo \"Multiple lines\"\n        echo \"of test output\"\n    ) | tee \"$STDOUT_LOG\" > /dev/null\n\n    (\n        echo \"$test_stderr_msg\"\n        echo \"for validation\"\n    ) | tee \"$STDERR_LOG\" >&2\n\n    # Small delay to ensure files are written\n    sleep 0.1\n\n    # Verify files were created and contain content\n    log_info \"Verifying log files...\"\n\n    local validation_passed=0\n    local validation_failed=0\n\n    # Check stdout log\n    if [[ -f \"$STDOUT_LOG\" && -s \"$STDOUT_LOG\" ]]; then\n        local stdout_lines=$(wc -l < \"$STDOUT_LOG\")\n        log_info \"✓ Stdout log created: $STDOUT_LOG ($stdout_lines lines)\"\n        ((validation_passed++))\n    else\n        log_error \"✗ Stdout log missing or empty: $STDOUT_LOG\"\n        ((validation_failed++))\n    fi\n\n    # Check stderr log\n    if [[ -f \"$STDERR_LOG\" && -s \"$STDERR_LOG\" ]]; then\n        local stderr_lines=$(wc -l < \"$STDERR_LOG\")\n        log_info \"✓ Stderr log created: $STDERR_LOG ($stderr_lines lines)\"\n        ((validation_passed++))\n    else\n        log_error \"✗ Stderr log missing or empty: $STDERR_LOG\"\n        ((validation_failed++))\n    fi\n\n    # Verify content\n    if [[ -f \"$STDOUT_LOG\" ]]; then\n        if grep -q \"$test_stdout_msg\" \"$STDOUT_LOG\"; then\n            log_info \"✓ Stdout content validated\"\n            ((validation_passed++))\n        else\n            log_error \"✗ Stdout content validation failed\"\n            ((validation_failed++))\n        fi\n    fi\n\n    if [[ -f \"$STDERR_LOG\" ]]; then\n        if grep -q \"$test_stderr_msg\" \"$STDERR_LOG\"; then\n            log_info \"✓ Stderr content validated\"\n            ((validation_passed++))\n        else\n            log_error \"✗ Stderr content validation failed\"\n            ((validation_failed++))\n        fi\n    fi\n\n    log_info \"Validation results: $validation_passed passed, $validation_failed failed\"\n\n    if [[ $validation_failed -eq 0 ]]; then\n        log_info \"✓ Output redirection test PASSED\"\n        return 0\n    else\n        log_error \"✗ Output redirection test FAILED\"\n        return 1\n    fi\n}\n\n# Generate summary report\ngenerate_summary() {\n    log_section \"Generating Summary Report\"\n\n    {\n        echo \"=== Pluck Output Redirection Summary ===\"\n        echo \"Generated: $(date)\"\n        echo \"Bead ID: $BEAD_ID\"\n        echo \"Timestamp: $TIMESTAMP\"\n        echo \"\"\n        echo \"=== Configuration ===\"\n        echo \"Log Directory: $LOG_DIR\"\n        echo \"RUST_LOG Preset: $RUST_LOG_PRESET\"\n        echo \"RUST_LOG Value: ${RUST_LOG_PRESETS[$RUST_LOG_PRESET]}\"\n        echo \"\"\n        echo \"=== Log Files ===\"\n        echo \"Stdout: $STDOUT_LOG\"\n        echo \"Stderr: $STDERR_LOG\"\n        echo \"Combined: $COMBINED_LOG\"\n        echo \"Summary: $SUMMARY_LOG\"\n        echo \"\"\n        echo \"=== File Status ===\"\n\n        for log_file in \"$STDOUT_LOG\" \"$STDERR_LOG\"; do\n            if [[ -f \"$log_file\" ]]; then\n                local size=$(stat -c%s \"$log_file\" 2>/dev/null || stat -f%z \"$log_file\" 2>/dev/null || echo \"0\")\n                local lines=$(wc -l < \"$log_file\" 2>/dev/null || echo \"0\")\n                echo \"$(basename \"$log_file\"): ${size} bytes, ${lines} lines\"\n            else\n                echo \"$(basename \"$log_file\"): File not created\"\n            fi\n        done\n\n        echo \"\"\n        echo \"=== Validation Results ===\"\n        echo \"✓ Log directory created and verified\"\n        echo \"✓ Output redirection syntax validated\"\n        echo \"✓ Sample command successfully wrote to log file\"\n\n    } | tee \"$SUMMARY_LOG\"\n\n    log_info \"Summary report generated: $SUMMARY_LOG\"\n}\n\n# Display usage information\nshow_usage() {\n    cat << EOF\nUsage: $0 [OPTIONS]\n\nPluck Output Redirection Configuration Tool\n\nOptions:\n  -b, --bead-id ID          Bead ID for log file naming (default: manual)\n  -p, --preset PRESET       RUST_LOG preset level (default: standard)\n  -t, --test-only          Only run tests without full setup\n  -h, --help               Show this help message\n\nRUST_LOG Presets:\n  minimal       - INFO level: High-level strand operations only\n  standard      - DEBUG level: Filtering decisions and statistics\n  detailed      - TRACE level: Complete execution details\n  comprehensive - TRACE + supporting modules (bead_store, worker)\n  full          - All NEEDLE modules at DEBUG/TRACE level\n  maximum       - Everything at TRACE level (very verbose)\n\nExamples:\n  $0                              # Full setup with defaults\n  $0 -b bf-1234 -p comprehensive  # Setup for specific bead with detailed logging\n  $0 --test-only                 # Only test existing configuration\n\nEOF\n}\n\n# Parse command line arguments\nparse_args() {\n    while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do\n        case $1 in\n            -b|--bead-id)\n                BEAD_ID=\"$2\"\n                shift 2\n                ;;\n            -p|--preset)\n                RUST_LOG_PRESET=\"$2\"\n                shift 2\n                ;;\n            -t|--test-only)\n                TEST_ONLY=true\n                shift\n                ;;\n            -h|--help)\n                show_usage\n                exit 0\n                ;;\n            *)\n                log_error \"Unknown option: $1\"\n                show_usage\n                exit 1\n                ;;\n        esac\n    done\n}\n\n# Main execution\nmain() {\n    log_section \"Pluck Output Redirection Configuration\"\n\n    parse_args \"$@\"\n\n    # Validate RUST_LOG preset\n    if [[ -z \"${RUST_LOG_PRESETS[$RUST_LOG_PRESET]}\" ]]; then\n        log_error \"Invalid RUST_LOG preset: $RUST_LOG_PRESET\"\n        exit 1\n    fi\n\n    # Setup log directory\n    ensure_log_dir\n\n    # Validate log paths\n    if ! validate_log_paths; then\n        log_error \"Log path validation failed\"\n        exit 1\n    fi\n\n    # Setup redirection\n    setup_redirection\n\n    # Test redirection\n    if ! test_redirection; then\n        log_error \"Output redirection test failed\"\n        exit 1\n    fi\n\n    # Generate summary\n    generate_summary\n\n    log_section \"Configuration Complete\"\n    log_info \"✓ Log file location created and verified\"\n    log_info \"✓ Output redirection syntax validated\"\n    log_info \"✓ Sample command successfully wrote to log file\"\n    log_info \"\"\n    log_info \"Log rotation configured: $LOG_DIR/log-rotation-config.sh\"\n    log_info \"To run rotation: $LOG_DIR/log-rotation-config.sh\"\n\n    return 0\n}\n\n# Run main function\nmain \"$@\"","numLines":348,"startLine":1,"totalLines":348}}}

Rotate logs when they exceed 10MB\nMAX_AGE_DAYS=${MAX_AGE_DAYS:-7}      # Remove logs older than 7 days\nMAX_LOG_FILES=${MAX_LOG_FILES:-50}   # Keep maximum 50 log files\n\n# Colors for output\nRED='\\033[0;31m'\nGREEN='\\033[0;32m'\nYELLOW='\\033[1;33m'\nBLUE='\\033[0;34m'\nNC='\\033[0m' # No Color\n\nlog_info() {\n    echo -e \"${GREEN}[INFO]${NC} $*\"\n}\n\nlog_warn() {\n    echo -e \"${YELLOW}[WARN]${NC} $*\"\n}\n\nlog_error() {\n    echo -e \"${RED}[ERROR]${NC} $*\"\n}\n\nlog_section() {\n    echo -e \"${BLUE}=== $* ===${NC}\"\n}\n\n# Ensure log directory exists\nensure_log_dir() {\n    if [[ ! -d \"$LOG_DIR\" ]]; then\n        log_info \"Creating log directory: $LOG_DIR\"\n        mkdir -p \"$LOG_DIR\"\n    fi\n}\n\n# Get file size in MB\nget_file_size_mb() {\n    local file=$1\n    if [[ -f \"$file\" ]]; then\n        size=$(du -m \"$file\" 2>/dev/null | cut -f1)\n        echo \"${size:-0}\"\n    else\n        echo \"0\"\n    fi\n}\n\n# Rotate a single log file\nrotate_log_file() {\n    local log_file=$1\n    local base_name=$(basename \"$log_file\")\n    local size_mb=$(get_file_size_mb \"$log_file\")\n\n    if [[ $size_mb -ge $MAX_SIZE_MB ]]; then\n        log_info \"Rotating log file: $base_name (size: ${size_mb}MB)\"\n\n        # Find next available rotation number\n        local rot_num=1\n        while [[ -f \"${log_file}.${rot_num}\" ]]; do\n            ((rot_num++))\n        done\n\n        # Rotate the file\n        mv \"$log_file\" \"${log_file}.${rot_num}\"\n        log_info \"Rotated to: ${base_name}.${rot_num}\"\n    fi\n}\n\n# Clean up old log files\ncleanup_old_logs() {\n    log_info \"Cleaning up old logs (older than ${MAX_AGE_DAYS} days)...\"\n    local old_count=0\n\n    # Find and remove old log files\n    while IFS= read -r file; do\n        if [[ -n \"$file\" ]]; then\n            log_warn \"Removing old log: $(basename \"$file\")\"\n            rm -f \"$file\"\n            ((old_count++))\n        fi\n    done < <(find \"$LOG_DIR\" -type f -name \"*.log\" -mtime +$MAX_AGE_DAYS 2>/dev/null)\n\n    log_info \"Removed $old_count old log files\"\n}\n\n# Enforce maximum file count\nenforce_max_files() {\n    log_info \"Enforcing maximum log file count: $MAX_LOG_FILES\"\n\n    # Count current log files\n    local current_count=$(find \"$LOG_DIR\" -type f -name \"*.log\" 2>/dev/null | wc -l)\n\n    if [[ $current_count -gt $MAX_LOG_FILES ]]; then\n        local excess=$((current_count - MAX_LOG_FILES))\n        log_warn \"Found $current_count log files, removing $excess oldest files\"\n\n        # Remove oldest files\n        find \"$LOG_DIR\" -type f -name \"*.log\" -printf '%T@ %p\\n' 2>/dev/null | \\\n            sort -n | head -n \"$excess\" | cut -d' ' -f2- | while IFS= read -r file; do\n                if [[ -n \"$file\" ]]; then\n                    rm -f \"$file\"\n                fi\n            done\n\n        log_info \"Removed $excess oldest log files\"\n    else\n        log_info \"Log file count within limit: $current_count/$MAX_LOG_FILES\"\n    fi\n}\n\n# Check and rotate all active log files\nrotate_active_logs() {\n    log_info \"Checking for log files to rotate...\"\n    local rotated_count=0\n    local rotated_files=0\n\n    # Check all .log files in the directory\n    while IFS= read -r log_file; do\n        if [[ -n \"$log_file\" ]]; then\n            rotate_log_file \"$log_file\"\n            ((rotated_count++))\n            # Check if file was actually rotated\n            if [[ ! -f \"$log_file\" && -f \"${log_file}.1\" ]]; then\n                ((rotated_files++))\n            fi\n        fi\n    done < <(find \"$LOG_DIR\" -type f -name \"*.log\" -not -name \"* rotated *\" 2>/dev/null)\n\n    log_info \"Checked $rotated_count log files, rotated $rotated_files files\"\n}\n\n# Display usage information\nshow_usage() {\n    cat << EOF\nUsage: $0 [OPTIONS]\n\nPluck Log Rotation Management Tool\n\nOptions:\n  -d, --dry-run          Show what would be done without making changes\n  -h, --help             Show this help message\n\nConfiguration:\n  MAX_SIZE_MB:     Maximum log file size before rotation (default: 10MB)\n  MAX_AGE_DAYS:    Maximum age of log files to keep (default: 7 days)\n  MAX_LOG_FILES:   Maximum number of log files to keep (default: 50)\n\nExamples:\n  $0                          # Run rotation with default settings\n  MAX_SIZE_MB=5 $0            # Rotate logs at 5MB instead of 10MB\n  MAX_AGE_DAYS=3 $0           # Remove logs older than 3 days\n\nEOF\n}\n\n# Parse command line arguments\nparse_args() {\n    while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do\n        case $1 in\n            -d|--dry-run)\n                DRY_RUN=true\n                shift\n                ;;\n            -h|--help)\n                show_usage\n                exit 0\n                ;;\n            *)\n                log_error \"Unknown option: $1\"\n                show_usage\n                exit 1\n                ;;\n        esac\n    done\n}\n\n# Main execution\nmain() {\n    parse_args \"$@\"\n\n    ensure_log_dir\n\n    log_section \"Log Rotation Process\"\n    log_info \"Log Directory: $LOG_DIR\"\n    log_info \"Configuration:\"\n    log_info \"  Max Size: ${MAX_SIZE_MB}MB\"\n    log_info \"  Max Age: ${MAX_AGE_DAYS} days\"\n    log_info \"  Max Files: $MAX_LOG_FILES\"\n\n    if [[ \"$DRY_RUN\" == \"true\" ]]; then\n        log_info \"DRY RUN MODE - No changes will be made\"\n        log_section \"Dry Run Analysis\"\n        log_info \"Would check for files larger than ${MAX_SIZE_MB}MB\"\n        log_info \"Would remove files older than ${MAX_AGE_DAYS} days\"\n        log_info \"Would enforce maximum of $MAX_LOG_FILES files\"\n        exit 0\n    fi\n\n    # Perform rotation tasks\n    rotate_active_logs\n    cleanup_old_logs\n    enforce_max_files\n\n    log_section \"Rotation Complete\"\n\n    # Display summary\n    local total_files=$(find \"$LOG_DIR\" -type f -name \"*.log\" 2>/dev/null | wc -l)\n    local total_size=$(du -sh \"$LOG_DIR\" 2>/dev/null | cut -f1)\n\n    log_info \"Current log directory status:\"\n    log_info \"  Total files: $total_files\"\n    log_info \"  Total size: $total_size\"\n}\n\n# Run main function\nmain \"$@\"","numLines":221,"startLine":1,"totalLines":221}}}
